title: Map Of The Stars
definition: A comprehensive, cosmic chart of the universe, potentially containing the origin point of all things.

difficulty_levels.beginner: A celestial atlas that holds the secrets of the stars and their origins.
difficulty_levels.intermediate: A vast, interconnected chart detailing the cosmos, including its creation and the paths of celestial bodies.
difficulty_levels.expert: An all-encompassing map of the universe, potentially holding knowledge about the origin point and evolution of existence itself.

extra_fields.insight: The map could represent an ultimate truth or cosmic narrative underlying the fabric of reality.
